name: open-props
title: Open Props
description: Search and copy CSS custom properties from the Open Props design system.
author: tm.wrnr

commands.name: search-css-variables
commands.title: Search CSS Variables
commands.subtitle: Open Props
commands.description: Search and copy Open Props CSS custom properties.

commands.name: search-colors
commands.title: Search Colors
commands.subtitle: Open Props
commands.description: Search and copy Open Props colors.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
